title: Erang - Midnight Under the Monsters' Mask (Dungeon Synth)
album: Midnight Under the Monsters' Mask (Dungeon Synth)
note from erang: "I've made this compilation as a companion to my book "Midnight Under the Monsters' Mask". To me/ Horror and Dungeon Synth have always been linked. It took me 3 years to write & translate this book and I hope these weird stories will carry your imagination far away. Thanks for your support!
